sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Manhattan Beach, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: inventory competition versus pending demand. Primary keyword: Manhattan Beach housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Manhattan Beach housing market; Manhattan Beach real estate market update; Manhattan Beach home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Manhattan Beach; Manhattan Beach home selling market; Manhattan Beach homes for sale inventory; Manhattan Beach days on market; Manhattan Beach listing price; Manhattan Beach seller market; Manhattan Beach housing market 2026; Manhattan Beach market update sellers; Manhattan Beach median home price; are home prices dropping in Manhattan Beach; is now a good time to sell in Manhattan Beach. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
